name: Discord IPC
description:
Displays participants in your current Discord voice channel or call.
[warning]Requires Discord authorization[/warning]

widgets.name: Discord IPC
widgets.description:
Displays participants in your current Discord voice channel or call.
[warning]Requires Discord authorization[/warning]

autoHide.label: Auto-hide
autoHide.subLabel: Hide when not in a channel, or Discord is not running

clientId.label: Application Client ID
clientId.subLabel:
[danger]NOTE: Discord RPC API is in closed beta[/danger]
You [warning]NEED[/warning] your own client ID to use this widget. For direct widget authorization, enable [code]Public Client[/code] on the Discord OAuth2 page.

redirectUri.label: OAuth Redirect URI
redirectUri.subLabel: Must exactly match a Redirect on the Discord OAuth2 page. [warning]Public Client must be enabled[/warning] when authorizing directly from this widget.
